name: CivilRightsReport
description: A report published by the US Commission on Civil Rights, including briefing reports, advisory committee reports, and statutory enforcement reports.

title.example: A Targeted Response: Federal Enforcement of the Americans with Disabilities Act

topics.description: Civil rights topic areas covered in the report.

states_covered.description: US states covered in the report, if applicable.

advisory_committee.description: Name of the state advisory committee that produced the report, if applicable.

url.description: URL to the full report on the Commission website.

pdf_url.description: Direct URL to the PDF version of the report.

summary.description: Brief summary or abstract of the report findings.

recommendations_count.description: Number of formal recommendations included in the report.
